message: Venue confirmed but Greg must pick the exact early-August date before we can update the registration page.
Picked up the UN Sept 21-22 eSpeakers calendar entry.
Drafted 2 of 3 newsletter articles from the unpublished website backlog; voice pass still needed on the third.
Follow-up sent to Doug Means; requesting planner review before closing out.
Tracker rows refreshed and Friday report drafted for Greg's review.
Static build script for the mission control page is working locally; wiring up Pages publish next.
PodMatch session keeps flashing to /login before cookie auth resolves; holding until next active window.
